data.name: RIOT on Sui
data.desc:
Problem: AI agents today are stateless and fragmented. They lose context across sessions, can't share knowledge across tools, and memory is locked to single platforms. NFTs are just static JPEGs with zero ongoing utility.

Solution: $RIOT is a multi-agent punk collective where each of 25 characters is a long-running autonomous agent with persistent memory. Users connect their Sui wallet to unlock all 25 agents. Every conversation is auto-saved to Walrus decentralized storage every 5 messages. Agents remember your name, visit count, and conversation history across sessions ,even when you switch between different agents, the memory persists.

Key Innovation: "Immortalize" . users can store any conversation permanently on Sui Mainnet via Move smart contract, creating an on-chain memory object with verifiable proof on SuiScan. Gas estimate shown before signing.

What makes it unique:

• Persistent Memory: Cross-session agent memory stored on Walrus , not local cache 

• Multi-Agent Coordination: 25 specialist agents with distinct personalities that share context

• On-Chain Verification: Every memory immortalized as Move object on Sui Mainnet

• Artifact-Driven Workflows: Chat logs and agent responses stored as verifiable Walrus blobs

• Wallet-Gated Access: Connect Sui wallet to unlock all 25 agents

• Punk Aesthetic: Graffiti, glitch, neon UI with custom punk fonts

• Built on Sui: Programmable object model + Walrus for decentralized persistence

25 agents with unique personalities ready. Walrus integration and Move smart contract active on Mainnet.

data.name: Sui Pump
data.desc:
SuiPump is a permissionless bonding-curve token launchpad on Sui — the first of its kind on the network. Anyone can launch a fungible token in 2 wallet signatures, no coding required. Price discovery happens automatically through an on-chain constant-product AMM, and tokens graduate to one of three DEXes — Cetus, Turbos, or DeepBook — once they reach the graduation threshold.

Why SuiPump is different:

Oracle-based dynamic graduation — the graduation threshold is recomputed on every buy against SUI's live USD price (Pyth), so every token graduates at a consistent dollar market cap regardless of where SUI trades. No other Sui launchpad does this.

1% trade fee with 40% going to creators (vs pump.fun's 24%) — the best creator economics on Sui.

10% LP fee retained in the curve, deepening liquidity over time.

Front-run-safe graduation — all fund routing is automatic and internal.

Transferable CreatorCap with up to 10 payout recipients.

Season 1 airdrop — 50% of protocol fees distributed to early users.

Current state: Live on Sui testnet, stress-tested to 658,000+ SUI in trading volume. 55/55 Move unit tests + 59/59 Python harness passing. Internal pre-audit security review complete with zero critical, high, or medium-severity findings. Targeting mainnet after an independent third-party Move audit.

Tech stack: Move smart contracts (fully on-chain, non-custodial — no funds leave the protocol's control) + React/Vite frontend with @mysten/dapp-kit, plus a Talus Nexus autonomous trading agent with Rust signed-HTTP tool servers. A lightweight off-chain indexer provides read-only data and real-time feeds; it holds no funds and sits in no transaction path.

Target: $50M+/month trading volume within 12 months of mainnet launch.

data.name: HypersFun
data.desc:
Hypers.fun is a decentralized tokenized fund protocol — any trader can launch an onchain fund in one click, investors buy fund tokens backed by NAV-anchored pricing and bonding curve liquidity, automatically reflecting real-time PnL. No execution lag, no slippage, no missed signals.

Already live on HyperEVM mainnet with real users and TVL. Now building natively on Sui with DeepBook Margin integration for fully onchain leveraged trading.

data.name: sui-hotstore
data.desc: Sui HotStore is a local KV serving layer for Sui data applications. It ingests Sui-style transactions, objects, events, owners, and checkpoints into a RocksDB-compatible ToplingDB backend, then exposes low-latency APIs for tx lookup, object version lookup, event prefix scan, owner touched-object scan, and multi_get workloads. We benchmark ToplingDB against RocksDB using the same dataset, schema, and query keysets.

data.name: SuiIntent
data.desc:
SuiIntent lets users complete cross‑protocol DeFi operations between Cetus and Navi on Sui with a single natural language sentence.

Why is this needed? Traditionally, users have to open two separate dApps, manually construct multiple transactions, sign repeatedly, and pay gas multiple times — a tedious and error‑prone process. SuiIntent reduces all of that to a “one‑sentence finish.”

Here’s how it works. A user types, for example, “Swap 0.1 SUI for USDC, then deposit that USDC into Navi.” The system automatically uses a large language model to parse the intent, extracting the token, amount, operation order, and other key details. It then executes the swap on Cetus and the deposit on Navi in the correct sequence. Crucially, all steps are bundled into a single atomic transaction on the Sui blockchain: if any step fails, the entire transaction rolls back without any manual intervention. As a result, the user signs only once and pays gas only once to complete the entire cross‑protocol workflow.

Currently, SuiIntent supports swaps on Cetus, deposits/withdrawals/borrow/repay on Navi, and native SUI transfers. As the first open‑source “natural language → multi‑protocol atomic transaction” project on Sui, SuiIntent enables everyday users to participate in DeFi with zero learning curve. Moreover, its design allows seamless integration of more protocols in the future.

data.name: TIDE
data.desc:
TIDE is a Sui-native operating layer for BTC treasuries. It helps holders and treasury operators define policy-driven rules for liquidity, drawdowns, debt, buffers, and repayment behavior before capital moves.


Instead of treating BTC treasury management as a manual spreadsheet or a black-box bot, TIDE turns each decision into a reviewable and verifiable workflow: model the position, stress-test BTC price paths, choose a rail profile, review the policy, and produce an on-chain receipt that explains what was decided and what evidence supported it.


The long-term vision is a non-custodial BTCfi cockpit where operators keep control of their wallets while TIDE provides policy logic, simulation, proof bundles, rail-aware readbacks, and auditable execution history across Sui-based lending and liquidity venues.


TIDE uses Sui Move for policy and receipt objects, Walrus for proof bundle storage, and oracle/readback inputs such as Pyth and protocol state to make treasury decisions transparent, reproducible, and inspectable.

data.name: NoaSight
data.desc:
NoaSight is a decentralized, non-custodial prediction market protocol engineered for the next generation of forecasters. While inspired by the likes of Polymarket, NoaSight solves the "latency tax" found on other chains by utilizing Sui’s parallel execution and programmable transaction blocks (PTBs) to deliver near-instant settlements and ultra-low fees.

The NoaSight Ecosystem

NoaSight is built on three pillars designed to decentralize the entire lifecycle of a market, from creation to resolution:

Noa Market (The Core): The flagship trading interface. By leveraging Sui's Object Model, each market operates as an independent state, allowing for massive concurrency. Traders can buy and sell "Outcome Tokens" with a CEX-like feel but with full on-chain transparency.

Noa DAO (The Governance): A decentralized factory for market creation. Community members stake tokens to propose and vote on new markets. This ensures the platform is driven by user demand rather than centralized curation, utilizing Sui’s native multisig and governance capabilities.

Noa Oracle (The Truth Layer): A specialized resolution dashboard that bridges real-world data with on-chain outcomes. Noa Oracle utilizes a hybrid approach—integrating decentralized price feeds with a community-driven dispute mechanism—to ensure every market settles fairly and accurately.

data.name: AGENT ON SUI
data.desc: $AGENT is a live, AI-powered trading ecosystem built on the Sui blockchain that combines automated trading, liquidity infrastructure, and on-chain competition into a single working system; users can trade tokens through a Telegram bot using built-in strategies, access deeper liquidity via dual pools for better execution, and participate in a fully on-chain “Arena” where trading agents compete for real rewards, while the token itself powers fees, access, and future tools like launchpads, analytics, and DeFi infrastructuremaking it not just a token, but an early-stage platform designed to evolve into a core trading and utility layer for the Sui ecosystem.

data.name: suibets
data.desc:
SuiBets delivers a full-stack liquidity and settlement layer on Sui Network, where every wager is executed and finalized fully on-chain. Market data, bet history, and state are persisted via Walrus Protocol, ensuring verifiable, tamper-resistant records.

The platform integrates SuiNS for human-readable identities and zkLogin for seamless, privacy-preserving authentication without compromising self-custody. Leveraging Sui’s object-centric architecture and parallel execution, SuiBets enables high-throughput order matching, near-instant finality, and capital-efficient liquidity coordination.

A dedicated on-chain liability engine tracks exposure across all markets in real time, enforcing collateralization, margin constraints, and automated payout guarantees. Liquidity providers and group bettors can pool capital into shared vaults, with programmable risk parameters and dynamic odds curves adjusting based on market demand and exposure.

SuiBets natively supports multiple currencies, including SUI, USDSUI , and the SuiBets token for incentives, fee rebates, and governance. This multi-asset design allows precise risk hedging, deep liquidity layers, and efficient settlement across both prediction markets and a fully on-chain sportsbook-built for scale and sophisticated capital participation.

data.name: Sunflower
data.desc: SuiShield is a live security analytics and intelligence platform for the Sui ecosystem. It turns fragmented, unverifiable security data into a transparent, on-chain intelligence layer that anyone, users, developers, auditors, and institutions  can rely on.
